rulings.Case Title: ROBERT L. FARMER AS TRUSTEE OF THE MARSHALL I. WAIS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Lonna A. Wais Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Response Of Remaindermen To Petitioners First Amended Petition Or, In The Alternative, Demurrer Thereto; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Lonna A. Wais' Motion to Strike Response of Remaindermen to Petitioner's First Amended Petition is denied. The Demurrer, in the alternative, is overruled. Request for Judicial Notice by Lonna A. Wais 1. Transcript of 11/6/2012 proceedings. Granted. Request for Judicial Notice by Remaindermen 1. Lonna Wais' Memorandum of Points and Authrities in Support of Motion for Protective Order. Denied. Not filed. 2. Lonna Wais' Motion for Protective Order. Denied. Not filed. 3. Exhibit A to Leahy Declarationin Support of Lonna Wais' Motion for Protective Order. Denied. Not filed. As to 1, 2, and 3 above, the Court notes that Mrs. Wais' counsel does not dispute the allegations contained in Mr. Norman's Declaration that counsel for Mrs. Wais served a Motion for Protective Order, Points and Authorities, and Declaration but failed to file these documents in violation of CCP section 1005(b), failed to notify counsel that the motion was never filed, and failed to properly calendar the motion as required by Local Rule 14.10. 4. 2006 Petition for Instructions and the 850 Petition filed by former Trustee Robert Farmer. Granted as to the fact of filing and that the allegations contained therein were made. 5. Court of Appeal unpublished Opinion dated 9/22/2009 In re Estate of Wais (2009) WL 2004413. Granted. 6. Remaindermen's Reply to 850 Petition. Granted as to the fact of filing and that the allegations contained therein were made. 7. San Francisco Superior Court Register of Actions in PTR-08-291579 and PES-06-289350. Granted. 8. Remaindermen's Verified Response to Amended 850 Petition filed 2/7/2014. Granted as to the fact of filing and that the allegations contained therein were made. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative must nofiy the Court (415-551-3702) and all counsel by 5:00 p.m. on 3/19/2014.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LUCY MAE GRIMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For (Proposed)Dna Siblingship Testing Order
rulings.Rulings: Jerome Grimes's Motion to Require Diana Starnes to Submit to DNA Testing is DENIED. The Court may not order a DNA test to determine intestate succession. (Estate of Sanders (1992) 2 Cal.App.4th 462; Prob. Code Section 6450.) The prevailing party must prepare an order and bring to the hearing. Any party who wishes to argue the tentative ruling must notify the Court (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel by 5:00 p.m. on March 19, 2014.
